start: ^Player: ...Did a mushroom just flirt with me?
^Kopatych: Honey, after three rainy nights and a suspicious amount of spores, anything can happen.
^Kopatych: Around here we call it "organic chemistry."
weird: ^Kopatych: Weird? Darling, my cousin thought he was immortal.
^Kopatych: Then someone turned him into mushroom soup.
like_weird: ^Kopatych: Careful. That's exactly what my last victim said.
^Kopatych: Relax. We only drained his emotional energy.
leave: ^Kopatych: Fine. But if you start seeing colors and hearing the trees whisper your name...
